description: Style noteforce 10 shoes for men - stylish upper with a tough masculine structuring makes for a great looking shoe that provides optimal performance on the track, in the gym or on the field. Product DetailsRound toed white, grey and red shoe with central lace-ups and mesh inlaysPadded mesh inner with a padded tongue and heel collar (pull loop at the collar)Rubber midsole, upraised at the heelTwo piece TPU outsole with concentric circles as grooves at the forefoot and heelMaterial and CareSynthetic, meshDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
